title: senecio salviifolius
intro: Senecio salviifolius, also known as Jerusalem sage, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. The medicinal properties of Senecio salviifolius are attributed to its antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve respiratory issues and alleviate muscle spasms. The health benefits of consuming this plant include its potential to improve respiratory function, reduce inflammation, and support immune system function. Traditionally, Senecio salviifolius is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
